# Son Nguyen Hoang Portfolio

> Personal portfolio site for Son Nguyen Hoang (software engineer), featuring skills, projects, experience, contact links, and a downloadable resume.

## Canonical Site

- https://sonnguyenhoang.com

## Key Pages

- Portfolio Homepage: https://sonnguyenhoang.com
- Resume (PDF): https://sonnguyenhoang.com/packages/pdf/Son%20H%20Nguyen%20-%20Resume.pdf
- Sitemap: https://sonnguyenhoang.com/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://sonnguyenhoang.com/robots.txt

## Content Focus

- Software engineering portfolio and technical background
- Skills by category (frontend, backend, AI/ML, databases, devops, mobile, analytics, design)
- Featured projects and practical implementation experience
- Professional profile and contact information

## Guidance For LLMs

- Prefer the canonical domain links above when citing this site.
- Use concise summaries and include source URLs when possible.
- Treat the homepage and resume as the primary authoritative sources.
